definition: having knowledge or skill from doing something

sentences.text: The company is looking for an _____ project manager.
She is _____ in dealing with international clients.

definition: a person who designs or develops technical systems

sentences.text: The _____ designed a more efficient production system.
Our company hired an _____ to improve the software platform.
The _____ explained the technical problem to the management team.
